gcp.logging.billingAccounts.sinks.create.description: Creates a sink that exports specified log entries to a destination. The export begins upon ingress, unless the sink's writer_identity is not permitted to write to the destination. A sink can export lo

required.description: Required. The resource in which to create the sink: "projects/[PROJECT_ID]" "organizations/[ORGANIZATION_ID]" "billingAc

required.description: Required. The full resource name of the sink to update, including the parent resource and the sink identifier: "projects

required.description: Required. The full resource name of the sink to delete, including the parent resource and the sink identifier: "projects

can_come_from.note: [tier 1/exact] call gcp.logging.billingAccounts.sinks.list, iterate response["sinks"][], extract item["name"] → fill {sinkId}
